steps.title: Identify what the underlined claim requires
steps.content: The underlined passage states that Beloved resembles magical realism specifically because it juxtaposes literary realism with Black American cultural traditions. A supporting quotation must directly reference both these elements and demonstrate their relationship.

steps.title: Find the quotation showing both elements at work
steps.content: Choice D states that Beloved “conforms to the conventions of realistic fiction” while “incorporates elements drawn from Black American cultural traditions that transcend and expose the limitations of realism”—directly showing how the cultural traditions function in juxtaposition with the realistic mode to create the resemblance to magical realism. Choices A and B introduce unrelated competing influences, and C frames the elements as alternating rather than integrated. That matches choice D — D is correct.
